About me

Curious mind, builder at heart

I am passionate about technology, networking, and digital solutions. I enjoy solving technical problems and creating digital content. With a strong foundation in network infrastructure, web development, and digital tools, I bring a hands-on approach to every challenge.

My skills span across networking, cybersecurity, IT support, WordPress development, content creation, and digital strategy allowing me to bridge the gap between technical complexity and practical, real-world results.

My goal is to continue growing at the intersection of technology and innovation leveraging my expertise to develop smarter digital solutions, contribute to impactful projects, and help individuals and organizations navigate an increasingly connected world.

Projects

Things I've built & explored

Hands-on projects spanning network design, cybersecurity, web development, database systems, and media production.

Cisco Packet Tracer — Enterprise Network Design

Designed a full enterprise network topology with multiple buildings, VLANs, routing, web/FTP servers, and multi-department connectivity tested in Cisco Packet Tracer.

Cisco Packet TracerVLANsRoutingEnterprise Networking
VLAN Configuration & Internet Connectivity (GNS3)

Set up VLANs and internet connectivity using GNS3 with cloud integration. Configured routers, switches, and tested inter-VLAN routing with real-world connectivity scenarios.

GNS3VLANsRoutingCloud
Network Connectivity Testing & Troubleshooting

Demonstrated successful VLAN connectivity using ping tests across subnets in Cisco Packet Tracer. Verified 0% packet loss across multiple network segments with department-level VLANs.

Packet TracerPing TestingVLANsTroubleshooting
Database Management System (Microsoft Access)

Designed and built a relational database with user authentication, login forms, student records, and data management using Microsoft Access. Applied normalization principles.

Microsoft AccessDatabase DesignNormalizationForms

Developed a fully functional e-commerce website called TechCart using WordPress and WooCommerce. Features product listings for electronics and gadgets, shopping cart, and payment integration.
